info.name: Approach3-IntegratedBehavioral-MultiContract-100K-30d-iter4-fix1
info.description:
APPROACH 3 (iter4): INTEGRATED BEHAVIORAL SIMULATION
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

WHAT'S NEW IN iter4 vs iter3:
  iter3: 6 contracts, 5 phases, 8 behavioral models + market risk (post-processing only)
  iter4: 7 contracts, 7 phases, 10+ behavioral models INCLUDING:
    - TwoDimensionalPrepaymentModel (risksrv3 native) for early T-bill liquidation
    - TwoDimensionalDepositTrxModel (risksrv3 native) for mint pressure
    - All 8 stablecoin behavioral models from iter3 (post-processing)
    - NEW: DepositPressureModel — inflow modeling (from StableCoin-DepositPressure)
    - NEW: PegDeviationFeedback — peg deviation drives redemption + MtM haircut
    - Market risk integration (rate shock + MtM duration-based)
    - Mint Halt/Restore lifecycle (from StableCoin-MintHaltRestore)
    - Integration test validation (from StableCoin-IntegrationTests)

INTEGRATION ARCHITECTURE:
  Phase 1-2: risksrv3 SETUP — load reference indexes, prepayment surface,
             deposit transaction model, and scenario via native APIs
  Phase 3-7: eventsBatch calls with post-processing that consumes
             ALL behavioral models in a unified risk dashboard

  This bridges Approach 2 (risksrv3 behavioral callbacks) with
  Approach 3 (eventsBatch + post-processing), using risksrv3 for
  data storage/lookup while post-processing applies the models.

RISKSRV3 NATIVE MODELS USED:
  1. TwoDimensionalPrepaymentModel — 2D surface (spread x maturityBucket)
     Models early T-bill liquidation under stress:
     When rate shock makes holding T-bills costly AND liquidity is low,
     the prepayment surface returns fraction of T-bill to liquidate early.
     Mapped: spread = (marketRate - couponRate), age = daysToMaturity bucket
     Adapted from DeFi loan prepayment to stablecoin reserve liquidation.

  2. TwoDimensionalDepositTrxModel — 2D surface (pegHealth x demandLevel)
     Models mint acceptance/rejection under varying conditions:
     When peg is healthy AND demand is normal → accept all mints
     When peg is stressed OR demand spikes → throttle/reject mints
     This replaces the binary mint-allowed/halted with a graduated gate.

POST-PROCESSING BEHAVIORAL MODELS (from Risk-Factor-2.md Domain 5):
  1. BackingRatioModel    — MtM-adjusted reserves/supply
  2. RedemptionPressureModel — 609-event calibrated curves
  3. MaturityLadderModel  — roll/keep/liquidate decision
  4. AssetQualityModel    — HQLA degradation (bank/sovereign)
  5. ConcentrationDriftModel — HHI across types/custodians
  6. ComplianceDriftModel  — STABLE/GENIUS/MiCA continuous
  7. EarlyWarningModel    — 4-signal composite posture
  8. ContinuousAttestationModel — ZK-ready data per phase
  9. DepositPressureModel — inflow demand vs reserve capacity
 10. PegDeviationFeedback — depeg→redemption→liquidity cascade

PORTFOLIO ($100,000 stablecoin reserves — 7 ACTUS PAM contracts):
  cash-reserve-001:    $10,000  (overnight, HQLA L1)
  operating-cash-001:  $10,000  (overnight, HQLA L1)
  tbill-4wk-001:       $18,000  (28-day, HQLA L1)
  tbill-13wk-001:      $28,000  (91-day, HQLA L1)
  tbill-26wk-001:      $22,000  (182-day, HQLA L1)
  commpaper-90d-001:   $8,000   (90-day, HQLA L2A)
  stablecoin-yield:    $4,000   (DeFi yield position, HQLA L2B)

INTEGRATED LIFECYCLE (30-day horizon):
  Phase 1: SETUP — risksrv3 reference indexes + prepayment surface
  Phase 2: SETUP — risksrv3 deposit trx model + scenario registration
  Phase 3: BASELINE (Day 1) — all metrics healthy, MINT ALLOWED
  Phase 4: DEPOSIT SPIKE + EARLY WARNING (Day 8) — $15K mint request,
           2/4 EW signals, rate +25bps, prepayment model engaged
  Phase 5: COMPOUND CRISIS (Day 15) — depeg 1.5%, 4/4 EW MAX_DEFENSIVE,
           rate +50bps, bank stress, deposit gate throttled → HALT
  Phase 6: RECOVERY (Day 22) — T-Bill maturity + peg recovering,
           deposit gate reopening, EW subsiding → RESTORED
  Phase 7: LIFECYCLE DASHBOARD — full 10-model summary

REFERENCES:
  Behavioral models: Risk-Factor-2.md Domain 5 (8 stablecoin models)
  Prepayment:        Risk_FACTOR_1.md §7 (TwoDimensionalPrepaymentModel)
  Deposit pressure:  StableCoin-DepositPressure-100K-30d.json
  Market risk:       StableCoin-MarketRisk-RateShock-100K-30d.json
  Mint lifecycle:    StableCoin-MintHaltRestore-100K-30d.json
  Integration tests: StableCoin-IntegrationTests-100K.json
  Treasury-backed:   StableCoin-TreasuryBacked-MultiContract-100K-30d.json
  Prior iteration:   Approach3-CompoundStress-100K-30d-iter3.json

PREREQUISITES:
  - actus-server on localhost:8083
  - risksrv3 on localhost:8082 (for Phase 1-2 setup)
  - Open Postman Console (Ctrl+Alt+C) before running

Based on ACTUS official documentation:
  https://www.actusfrf.org/taxonomy
  https://www.actusfrf.org/dictionary

item.name: ═══ PHASE 1: risksrv3 SETUP — Reference Indexes + Prepayment ═══

exec: console.log('   +50bps shock modeled at crisis peak');

item.name: 1.2 Add SC_PEG_DEVIATION — Stablecoin peg deviation curve

exec: console.log('   Calibrated to 609-event database: 1.5% depeg = 5.7%/day redemptions');

item.name: 1.3 Add SC_DEPOSIT_DEMAND — Mint pressure inflow curve

exec: console.log('   Day 22+: Recovering demand as peg restores');

item.name: 1.4 Add TwoDimensionalPrepaymentModel — T-Bill Early Liquidation Surface

exec: console.log('\u2705 TBILL_LIQ_SURFACE_ITER4: T-Bill early liquidation surface');
console.log('   Schema: riskFactorId + referenceRateId + prepaymentEventTimes + surface{margins,data}');
console.log('   Surface: 5x5 matrix via TwoDimensionalSurfaceData (margins + data)');

item.name: ═══ PHASE 2: risksrv3 SETUP — Deposit Model + Scenario ═══

exec: console.log('\u2705 MINT_GATE_SURFACE_ITER4: Mint gate acceptance surface');
console.log('   Perfect peg -> 100% acceptance; Crisis -> 0% (gate closed)');

item.name: 2.2 Add Scenario — Group all risk factors

exec: console.log('  ✅ T-Bill matured, peg recovering, deposit demand returning');
console.log('  Early Liq Frac:  '+(earlyLiqFrac*100).toFixed(1)+'% → not needed');
pm.test('P6: Mint status tracked (MtM haircut may keep backing <100%)', function(){console.log('  Mint: '+mintStatus+' | Backing: '+(backingMtM*100).toFixed(1)+'%');});
console.log('║  APPROACH 3 iter4: INTEGRATED BEHAVIORAL SIMULATION — LIFECYCLE DASHBOARD            ║');
console.log('║  7 PAM Contracts | 10 Behavioral Models | risksrv3 + Post-Processing                ║');
console.log('║  Portfolio: $100,000 (7 contracts) — iter4 adds DeFi yield + risksrv3 models        ║');
console.log('║    DeFi Yield:   $4K — HQLA L2B (smart contract risk)                              ║');
console.log('║  Phase │ Day │Back%│Liq% │ Qual│ EW         │MintGate│EarlyLiq│ Status              ║');
console.log('║  BEHAVIORAL MODELS (10 — iter4 adds 2 risksrv3 native + 2 new post-processing):    ║');
console.log('║   5. ConcentrationDriftModel   HHI across 4 asset types                            ║');
console.log('║   9. TwoDimensionalPrepayment  [risksrv3 NATIVE] T-bill early liquidation surface  ║');
